steps_from_wk50_plan: Ask "how are you doing?" and verify status response only.
Ask "go home" and verify response plus movement toward home/safety when feasible.
Ask "buy potions" and verify buy/move/refusal depending situation.
Ask "explore east" and verify a safe movement/explore response.
Ask "attack the lair" and verify MVP refuses or says it cannot do that yet, not hallucinating an attack.
Try a badly wounded hero and verify unsafe requests redirect toward healing.

manual_retest_steps_no_entry_path: Launch the game with mock LLM enabled (`--provider mock` on your usual launcher or run configuration — do not rely on typing a filesystem path).
Open a hero chat; send "go home" — expect movement toward home or safety when resolvable; success overlay only when a move commits.
Send "buy potions" — expect travel to commerce or accurate refusal (no gold, no potions sold here); no false "applied" hint if nothing commits.
Send "explore east" — expect sustained eastbound movement intent across ticks, not immediate replacement by unrelated idle routing.
Optional: provoke a validated move_to response that fails engine resolution — confirm chat hint stays in the not-applied / refused family, not "Order applied".

recommended_next_actions: Jaimie: run manual retest above on her integrated build if verifying end-to-end feel.
